overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along a futuristic multi-level highway system during golden hour. The camera moves through moderate traffic, passing under elevated monorail tracks and alongside construction sites, with flying vehicles visible in the sky above the complex interchange.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete plaza near construction site with elevated transit track

agents.ego_description: navigating through an open concrete plaza area near a construction site, passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving across the plaza ahead of camera

entered.detail: tall yellow construction crane towering over unfinished building
building under construction with exposed framework and scaffolding
red elevated monorail track supported by massive concrete pillars
distant mountains visible on the horizon with warm sunlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide concrete plaza near a construction site, with a tall yellow crane and unfinished high-rise dominating the left side. The camera drives forward, turning slightly left, approaching a red elevated monorail track that spans across the scene. Other vehicles are scattered across the plaza, and distant mountains are visible in the golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway passing under elevated transit tracks

events.description: transitions from open plaza onto multi-lane highway passing under elevated monorail tracks
green sports car overtakes on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving along the multi-lane highway, maintaining speed while passing under the elevated track structure

notable_agents.action: green sports car overtaking on the right and moving ahead

entered.detail: vertical digital billboard displaying purple MIXIT advertisement
massive concrete support pillars for the elevated track

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a multi-lane highway passing under the elevated monorail track, creating a semi-covered environment with mixed lighting. A MIXIT billboard appears on the right side. Traffic flows around the camera, including a green sports car that overtakes on the right. The construction site recedes behind as the highway stretches forward under the concrete pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway curve with view of lower interchange levels

events.description: camera shifts to right lane revealing lower levels of the highway interchange
flying vehicle appears in the sky above the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway curve, moving toward the right side to view the lower levels of the interchange

notable_agents.action: flying car hovering and moving across the sky above the highway

entered.detail: lower tier of the highway interchange visible below the current road level with vehicles
tall electrical transmission towers with power lines in the distance
concrete barrier along the right edge of the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The highway curves to the right as the camera shifts lanes, revealing a complex multi-level interchange with lower highways visible below. A flying vehicle appears in the sky, hovering above the road. The MIXIT billboard passes out of view behind, while electrical transmission towers become visible in the distance against the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with complex multi-level interchange and distant urban skyline

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right

agents.ego_description: driving along the elevated highway with views of the complex interchange system and passing flying vehicles

notable_agents.action: flying car moving across the sky from left to right above the highway

entered.detail: tall orange residential towers visible in the distant urban skyline
curved concrete ramp connecting different levels of the highway system

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the elevated highway with expansive views of the complex interchange system. Orange apartment towers rise in the distance, growing larger as the camera approaches. Flying vehicles pass overhead, and the highway curves gently through the futuristic urban landscape with the monorail track still visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a wide construction plaza into a complex, multi-level futuristic highway system during the golden hour. It begins by moving past a tall yellow crane and an unfinished high-rise, turning slightly left toward a red elevated monorail track that spans the horizon. As the camera passes under the monorail, the environment shifts into a semi-covered highway where a green sports car overtakes on the right and a MIXIT billboard flashes by. The scene then opens up as the road curves right, revealing a sprawling interchange with lower highways below and a flying vehicle hovering in the sky. Finally, the camera glides along the elevated road toward distant orange apartment towers, with electrical transmission towers and the monorail track framing the expansive urban landscape.
